title.sl: Magnetni držalo kablov za pisalno mizo

short.en: Loose-cable catcher with a magnetic base — pull a cable, the magnet stays.
short.sl: Lovilec ohlapnih kablov z magnetno osnovo — kabel povlečeš, magnet ostane.

description.en: USB-C and Lightning tips ferromagnetic enough on their own; for HDMI the tip glues into a small steel washer. Base houses three 10×3 mm magnets in hex pockets. Stops three cables from sliding behind the desk.
description.sl: USB-C in Lightning konektorji so dovolj feromagnetni; pri HDMI se konica zalepi v jekleno podložko. V osnovo so vstavljeni trije magneti 10×3 mm v šestrobne žepe. Trije kabli več ne zdrsnejo za mizo.
